title: Hook plumbing: .excn toggle config + schema + stamped settings wiring
description: The Scaffolder stamps the hook scaffolding's shared plumbing: a schema-validated toggle config in .excn (one enable flag per hook feature; schema added to the Instance schemas) and the project settings wiring that routes hook events to per-feature scripts. A missing or malformed config fails safe to no-op. Src-First; per ADR-0006.
acceptance_criteria: A freshly stamped Instance carries the toggle config, its schema, and the settings wiring
Each feature script no-ops when its toggle is off, when the config is missing, or when it is malformed
package-qa passes on the stamp contract
fix: Stamped hooks.config.json + hooks-config.schema.json + .claude/settings.json wiring + 5 fail-safe hook scripts; package-qa PASS, code-standards PASS.
notes: Filed 2026-06-10 (Brooks). Record restored 2026-06-10 after an id collision with a parallel-session filing (now EXEC-054).
